title: GAP-B: Update all .rs test and example URI strings
description: Why: After GAP-A changes the parser, all test URIs in .rs files must use the new format or every test suite fails.\n\nWhat: Find all secretx:// URI literal strings in .rs files across all 16 crates. Apply transformation: s|secretx://([^/]+)/|secretx:\1:|. ~321 occurrences estimated. Must cover doc-tests, unit tests, integration tests, and example code in doc comments. Verify: cargo test --all-features passes after change.
